title: ATLAS · MF Rank scored universe
description: Pre-scored universe for the MF Rank page (frontend-v1 spec §9). 4-factor composite (Returns / Risk / Resilience / Consistency) computed from raw `factor_inputs` then mapped to a 0–100 score via `100 · Φ(z)`. Stage 2 source: `/api/v1/mf/rank` (backlog). All numeric fields are Decimal-representable to 4 decimal places. Tie-break order is locked at `Consistency → Risk → Returns → Resilience` per spec §9 formula disclosure.

data_as_of.description: Date of the underlying NAV/holdings snapshot (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST).

universe_size.description: Total number of funds in the scored universe. Matches `funds.length`.

ranking_as_of.description: Date the composite ranking was last rebuilt (daily EOD cadence per spec §9 methodology footer).

tie_break_order.description: Locked tie-break sequence applied when `composite_score` ties. Fixed order per spec §9: `["consistency", "risk", "returns", "resilience"]`.

examples: ATLAS MF rank engine v1.1 — AMFI NAV + internal scoring

benchmark_map.description: Optional mapping from category → benchmark id used for the `excess_return_*` inputs. Enables consumers to display the per-fund benchmark without looking it up.

funds.description: Per-fund scored rows, ordered by `rank` ascending. Tied funds share a `rank` and carry a populated `tied_with` array.

fund_id.description: Internal ATLAS fund identifier (matches nav_series.schema.json → fund_id).

scheme_code.description: AMFI ISIN or numeric scheme code.

scheme_name.description: Alias for fund_name — full scheme name as registered with AMFI.
examples: Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth
Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth

category.description: SEBI scheme category (ATLAS taxonomy, matches MF Rank filter rail and nav_series.schema.json).

aum_crore.description: Scheme AUM in ₹ crore on `ranking_as_of`, 2 decimal places. Used by AUM-band filter (§9 filter rail).

age_years.description: Fund age from inception to `ranking_as_of`, in years, 2 decimal places. Used by the `min fund age` filter.

returns_score.description: Returns factor score (0–100). Formula: `100 · Φ((excess_return_1Y + excess_return_3Y + excess_return_5Y) / 3)` per spec §9.

risk_score.description: Risk factor score (0–100). Formula: `100 · Φ(−(0.4·vol_3Y + 0.4·max_dd_3Y + 0.2·downside_dev_3Y))` — negated so lower risk = higher score.

composite_score.description: Average of the four factor scores rounded to 1 decimal place. Composite = round((Returns + Risk + Resilience + Consistency) / 4, 1).

rank.description: 1-based rank within the entire universe after tie-break order is applied. Ties share the same `rank` value and each carries a populated `tied_with` array.

tie_break_rank.description: Alias for rank — 1-based rank after tie-break order is applied.

tied_with.description: Optional list of fund_ids that share this rank after tie-break. Present only when the tie persisted through all four tie-break fields.

factor_inputs.description: Raw per-fund inputs used to compute the four factor scores. Every value is Decimal-representable to 4 decimal places. Returns/vol/dd are decimal fractions (0.1234 = 12.34%) unless otherwise noted.

excess_return_1y.description: 1Y fund return minus category benchmark TRI return, as decimal fraction (0.0234 = +2.34% alpha).

excess_return_3y.description: 3Y annualised excess return vs category benchmark TRI, decimal fraction.

excess_return_5y.description: 5Y annualised excess return vs category benchmark TRI, decimal fraction.

vol_3y.description: 3Y annualised standard deviation of monthly returns, decimal fraction (0.1425 = 14.25% vol).

max_dd_3y.description: 3Y maximum drawdown, stored as positive decimal fraction (0.2218 = 22.18% drawdown). Computed from peak via running maximum.

downside_dev_3y.description: 3Y downside deviation (semi-deviation below MAR=0), annualised, decimal fraction.

downside_capture.description: 3Y downside capture ratio vs benchmark. 1.0 = captures all downside, <1 = defensive, >1 = amplifies. Decimal fraction.

worst_rolling_6m.description: Worst 6-month rolling return observed in 3Y window, decimal fraction (negative for loss).

rolling_12m_alpha.description: Median of rolling 12-month alpha (fund 12M return − benchmark 12M TRI return) over the 3Y window, decimal fraction.

rolling_pct_beating_bench.description: Share of rolling 12-month windows in the past 3Y where the fund beat its benchmark, decimal fraction 0–1 (0.7200 = 72% of windows).
